CREATE TABLE test_datatypes (id INTEGER, value_literal VARCHAR, value_integer INTEGER, value_float FLOAT, value_boolean BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_datatypes (id, value_literal, value_integer, value_float, value_boolean) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL, NULL, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_datatypes (id, value_literal, value_integer, value_float, value_boolean) VALUES (2, NULL, 100, NULL, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_datatypes (id, value_literal, value_integer, value_float, value_boolean) VALUES (3, NULL, NULL, 12.34, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_datatypes (id, value_literal, value_integer, value_float, value_boolean) VALUES (4, NULL, NULL, NULL, TRUE);
SELECT DISTINCT datatype(value_literal) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_literal IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, datatype(value_integer) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_integer IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, datatype(value_float) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_float IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, datatype(value_boolean) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_boolean IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, datatype(value_literal) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_integer IS NOT NULL);

SELECT t1.id, datatype(t1.value_literal) AS literal_type, datatype(t2.value_integer) AS integer_type FROM test_datatypes t1 JOIN test_datatypes t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value_literal IS NOT NULL AND t2.value_integer IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, datatype(value_literal) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_literal NOT LIKE '%invalid%';
SELECT DISTINCT datatype(value_literal) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_float < 10.0);
SELECT id, datatype(value_literal) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_boolean IS TRUE AND value_float IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CASE WHEN datatype(value_literal) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS status FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_literal IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, datatype(value_integer) AS data_type FROM test_datatypes WHERE datatype(value_integer) IN (SELECT datatype(value_integer) FROM test_datatypes WHERE value_integer IS NOT NULL);
